case_title: SF HOTEL 447, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. T R & A, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT TR&A, INC.'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO STAY ACTION
PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT T R & A, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT T R & A, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT T R & A, INC.'S PETITION TO COMPEL CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION TO STAY ACTION. GRANTED. THIS ACTION IS STAYED PENDING THE COMPLETION OF ARBITRATION. PLAINTIFF IS JUDICIALLY ESTOPPED FROM ARGUING THAT IT WAS NOT A PARTY TO THE CONSULTING AGREEMENT. IN ITS COMPLAINT, PLAINTIFF EXPLICITLY STATES THAT IT ENTERED INTO THE CONSULTING AGREEMENT WITH DEFENDANT AND ATTACHES THE CONSULTING AGREEMENT WITH THE ARBITRATION CLAUSE AS EXHIBIT A. (COMPLAINT, PAR. 6; SEE VALERIO V. ANDREW YOUNGQUIST CONSTRUCTION (2002) 103 CAL.APP.4TH 1264, 1271.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration To Stay Action
Off Calendar Apr-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. GARRET HURAI OF WENDEL ROSEN, TEL. NO. (510) 834-6600 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. NEL H. BUI APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT T R & A, INC.'S Petition To Compel Contractual Arbitration To Stay Action. Granted. This action is stayed pending the completion of arbitration. Plaintiff is judicially estopped from arguing that it was not a party to the Consulting Agreement. In its complaint, Plaintiff explicitly states that it entered into the Consulting Agreement with Defendant and attaches the Consulting Agreement with the arbitration clause as Exhibit A. (Complaint, par. 6; see Valerio v. Andrew Youngquist Construction (2002) 103 Cal.App.4th 1264, 1271.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976
